title: Omit<T, K> — drops the named properties
description: mion utility/omit.spec.ts — removes selected properties. Resolves to {name: string; createdAt: Date}.
notes: Resolves to the original shape minus the omitted keys. The omitted property can still appear on the input — structural typing accepts extras.
schema: createValidate(RT.omit(RT.object({name: RT.string(), age: RT.number(), createdAt: RT.date()}), ['age']))
generated: function YOw_CEYCicS(v){return (typeof v === 'object' && v !== null && typeof v.name === 'string' && (v.createdAt instanceof Date && !isNaN(v.createdAt.getTime())))}
